basic_details.job_title: JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) has released the official Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 2 Junior Research Fellow vacancies have been announced under the JNCASR Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 28 years of age with a Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science or a Graduate/ Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course with a valid GATE/ NET score (M.Sc. Chemistry desirable) can apply through Email on or before 18 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course with valid score in GATE/NET, M.Sc Chemistry (Desirable)
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course with a valid score in any one of the National Level examinations (GATE/ NET). Desirable: M.Sc Chemistry.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JNCASR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course with a valid score in any one of the National Level examinations (GATE/ NET). Desirable: M.Sc Chemistry.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at JNCASR is 18th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a Professional Course with a valid GATE/NET score. M.Sc Chemistry is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 31,000 per month, plus 24% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow position announced by JNCASR.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through Email. Candidates need to send their applications via email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the JNCASR Junior Research Fellow application?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR).

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Junior Research Fellow recruitment is NCU-EMR-171.
